scores.correctness_notes: Response correctly covers services (override, command, startup, environment), checks (http, level, period, timeout, threshold), and log-targets (loki type, location, services, labels). However, it omits the `on-check-failure` field in the service section that links check failures to service actions — a key pattern the gold standard highlights. The explanation also states only `loki` and `syslog` are supported log-target types, missing `opentelemetry`.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all fields used (after, on-success, on-failure, backoff-delay/factor/limit, http headers) are valid Pebble service/check fields.
